final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [7:0] out
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            out <= 8'b10000000;
        end else begin
            out <= {out[6:0], ~out[7]};
        end
    end
endmodule
